name: sentinel-protocol-v2
description: The Sentinel Protocol (v2.1.0): An integrated technical architecture for Digital Truth, Identity, and Authority in the AI Era. Implementing UHI (Unified Human Identity), C2PA-based CPO (Content Proof-of-Origin), and a decentralized Authority Ledger to combat deepfakes and restore trust in the global digital economy.
author: 1nsharma
